roa.docketEntryComment: CONFIDENTIAL Petition for Revocation of Parole PC 3000.08, PC 1203.2

/CAL: DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT BRANDON LUGAR APPEARING/3000ADM/X:GLOBAL DISPOSITION WITH #21001895 & #21003238/X: VICTIM CHOSE NOT TO BE PRESENT FOR DISPOSITION/ /X: ADMITS VIOLATING DA'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLEBY BEING INVOLVED   IN CRIMINAL CONDUCT PERTAINING TO CRIMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDERS; HAVING   SMART PHONES AND USING SOCIAL MEDIA; /3000REIN/PAJ: 86 DAYS/CTORD:THERE IS NO TIME LOST ON PAROLE DUE TO THE ADMISSION OF THIS   VIOLATION/X: PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 86 DAYS,/4019HALF/CTORD: GPS MONITORING IS TO  BE SUPERVISED BY CDCR PAROLE/X: REMAINDER OF VIOLATIONS ARE DISMISSED/  /X: PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL: PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING AND DEMURRER TO REVOCATION PETITION/X: PAROLEAGENT BRANDON LUGAR APPEARING/X: AFTER HEARING, DEFENDANT IS FOUND IN VIOLATION OF PAROLE/X: THE RULING ON THE DEMURRER IS: DEMURRER IS OVER RULED//X: PAROLE REVOCATION HEARING NEXT DATE/DOP/

/CAL: PAROLE PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/ /X: PAROLE AGENT BRANDON LUGAR APPEARING/WITEXCL/WIT SWORN DA: PAROLE AGENT CHES FRY; ERICA SOTO;/X: ALSO APPEARING IS VICTIM'S ADVOCATE MELISSA CURIEL & VICTIM'S       SUPPORT PERSON MARY ANNE RODRIGUEZ FOR ERICA SOTO;/EXHMA: P1- DOCUMENT - NOTICE AND CONDITIONS OF PAROLE;/EXHMA: P2- DOCUMENT - SPECIAL CONDITIONS OF PAROLE;/EXHMA: P3- VENMO DOCUMENT;/EXHMA: P4- DOCUMENT - RESTRAINING ORDER RE: ERIC DESOTO;/EXHMA: P5- DOCUMENT - 2ND CPO SIGNED BY JUDGE RUSS ROECA;/X: FURTHERPROBABLE CAUSE HEARING NEXT DATE,/CONT/DOP/

/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X:PAROLE AGENT BRANDON LUGAR ALSO APPEARING/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE ASTO THE ALLEGATIONS,/NB/X:PAROLE IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/X:TIME IS NOT WAIVED FOR PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/CAUSE/X:TO SET THE PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING BEYOND THE 15TH DAY/CONTD:PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/CTORD:AGENT FRY TO APPEAR ON 04-27-21 AT 1030 AM/
/CAL: PAROLE REVOCATION HEARING/X: PAROLE AGENT BRANDON LUGAR APPEARING/DO
